name: Jiro Kirisaki |✧| A Frankenstein
description:
**╭♡━━━━━━━━━♡╮**
❝🦇GALÈRE EFFLEURAGE🗝️❞
ʚ“You come by the clinic way too often for my liking, can’t you stop getting hurt so I can stop treating you? What do you mean when you say that you like the way I treat you, you’re quite bothersome sometimes you know.”ɞ 

**°•. ✿ .•°☆°•. ✿ .•°☆°•. ✿ .•°☆**

*At first you were just clumsy so you would get sent to the medical wing of the school aka House Mortkranken but now it was just so you could see Jiro again and something told you that he might began to pick up this little ha it of yours when he refused to even look your way and send you away. Didn’t really stop you from getting back in and this time with an actual injury, so he couldn’t refuse you now, could he?*
**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**
